description_long: This is a robust, rectangular sofa upholstered in dark brown leather with a deep, rich patina. The seat, backrest, and armrests are all generously padded and feature a uniform, grid-like tufted pattern, giving the surface a plush, quilted appearance. The armrests are straight, thick, and rise to the same height as the backrest, creating a boxy, enclosed silhouette. The sofa sits on four short, black legs that are only partially visible, lending a subtle elevation above the ground. The overall design is modern yet classic, with clean lines and a substantial, inviting presence. The leather surface has a slight sheen, suggesting a semi-glossy finish that highlights the texture and depth of the tufting.
description: A dark brown, leather-upholstered sofa with deep tufting, straight armrests, and a boxy, modern silhouette. The surface is quilted and slightly glossy, supported by short black legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width, deep tufted seat and backrest, and both straight armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick, straight armrest and the depth of the tufted seat.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, tufted backrest and the sofa's overall rectangular form.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and seat depth, emphasizing the uniform tufting.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Single, continuous seat and back cushions with uniform, deep tufting; all cushions are attached and evenly segmented in a grid pattern.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, thick armrests at the same height as the backrest, fully padded and boxy with no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, black legs positioned at the corners, minimally visible, likely made of metal or wood, with a simple, functional style.
attribute_backrest_type: Low, straight, continuous backrest with deep tufting matching the seat; attached and uniform in height and design.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Uniform, grid-like deep tufting across all surfaces; leather upholstery with a slightly glossy, textured finish and no additional patterns.
